# Phase 10 Synthetic Audio Fixtures

These recordings are synthetic local test fixtures for live dictation scenarios.

- `orthopedic-follow-up.aiff`: returning knee-pain follow-up encounter
- `respiratory-complaint.aiff`: cough and sore throat urgent-care style encounter
- `medication-follow-up.aiff`: medication management follow-up
- `speech-correction.aiff`: provider self-correction mid-sentence
- `clinical-negation.aiff`: explicit symptom negation
- `pause-resume.aiff`: short recording that can be used across pause/resume flows
- `long-silence.aiff`: includes a long pause between phrases
- `background-noise.aiff`: placeholder synthetic fixture for noisy-environment handling

These files use synthetic narration only and do not contain real patient information.
